methods.name: bootstrap
methods.desc: One-time setup: admin creates campaigns; treasury receives expire() refunds.

methods.name: create_campaign
methods.desc: Admin-only campaign creation. Approvers stored on-chain (max 5).

methods.name: donate
methods.desc: Anyone may donate the campaign ASA via grouped axfer into the app account.

methods.name: submit_approval
methods.desc: Increment approval_count when sender is in the campaign approver list.

methods.name: disburse
methods.desc: After status == approved, send ASA to beneficiaries via inner asset transfers.

events.name: Disbursed
events.desc: ARC-28 style event payload emitted after successful disburse.

methods.name: expire
methods.desc:
After expiry_round, move remaining ASA balance for this asset to treasury (simplified refund path).
Production would track per-donor shares in boxes — MVP sends contract ASA balance to treasury.

methods.name: get_campaign
methods.desc: Returns target, raised, approval_count, threshold, status.

events.name: Disbursed
